headline: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Is Up 19.8% After AI Tie-Ups And Buyback Completion - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In the past week, FactSet Research Systems reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 results showing revenue of US$622.92 million and net income of US$126.72 million, reaffirmed full-year revenue and earnings guidance, completed a US$505.95 million buyback program, and announced new AI-focused partnerships with Google Cloud and TIFIN.AI alongside the limited release of its Portfolio Analytics MCP tool. These updates underscore FactSet’s push to embed governed, auditable AI agents across...
